His overall style is casual and neat."}],"location":{"name":"庙会_白天","description":"「庙会_白天」广角镜头下庙会广场尽收眼底，地面铺红砖，左侧褐色栏杆延伸，右侧套圈摊位主体居中，柜台陈列奖品，摊位前方留有宽敞空地可供站立。远处可见寺庙飞檐与古树，人群在栏杆外流动。阳光高斜投射，地面映出摊位与栏杆阴影。","availableSlots":["在摊位正前方的中央空地","在摊位右侧栏杆旁的地面","在摊位左侧奖品展示架前","在摊位后方背板旁的空隙"]}}]}
entries.parsedImagePrompt: Full shot, eye-level angle, static frame. Two distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, an early-twenties woman with sharp, cold features, long black hair swept up in a tight, elegant bun, wearing a white silk shirt, a dark blue tailored blazer, off-white straight pants, and white pointed heels, pauses mid-stride, her back to the camera, right hand raised in a decisive farewell wave over her shoulder. While on the right foreground of the frame, a young man in his twenties with a boyish oval face, almond-shaped sparkling eyes, wavy hair and swept bangs, dressed casually in a white t-shirt and light blue unbuttoned shirt, beige pants, and white sneakers, stands completely motionless, holding a large golden cat securely in his arms, his expression solemn and his eyes fixed intently on the woman's retreating form. The scene is set in a wide temple fair square in the daytime, red brick pavement, left side brown railings, right side a booth with prizes displayed, distant ancient temple eaves and trees visible, crowd flowing behind the railings, high slanting sunlight casting long shadows. Dramatic backlight from the direction the woman is walking, creating a poignant farewell silhouette with warm ambient front light on the young man from the booth, warm color tone with a slight cool ambient shift in the background, medium depth of field keeping both figures relatively sharp. 2.5D semi-realistic style, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, cinematic portrait quality, smooth radiant skin with warm glow, natural skin undertones, sharply defined facial features.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The bustling temple fair square in the daytime, red brick pavement, left side brown railings, right side a booth with prizes displayed, distant ancient temple eaves and trees, static crowd figures standing behind the railings. High slanting sunlight casts distinct shadows on the ground. The entire environment remains completely static and still.
[Characters]
Bạch Ngưng Băng: Early twenties woman with a sharp, cold face, phoenix eyes, high bridged nose, thin lips. Long black hair in a tight bun exposing elegant neck. Tall slender frame wearing a white silk shirt, dark blue tailored blazer, off-white straight pants, white pointed heels. Silver necklace, silver bangle. Emotional state: Decisive farewell, walking away.
Tôi: Twenties boyish young man with an oval face, almond-shaped sparkling eyes, naturally arched brows, straight nose, full lips. Wavy hair with swept bangs. Tall slender build wearing white t-shirt under a light blue shirt, beige pants, white sneakers. Emotional state: Silently watching, expression falling.
Shot 1 (Full Shot, 1.93s): Static camera.
Action: Slow-motion. Bạch Ngưng Băng continues her decisive forward stride, her raised hand gracefully lowering back to her side as she walks deeper into the crowd and gradually disappears among the distant figures. Tôi remains frozen in the foreground, holding the large golden cat; his gaze stays locked on her trajectory, fingers subtly clenching the cat's soft fur as a slow, quiet weight settles over his expression. Smooth and fluid movement throughout with no camera motion.
